Author: Bronya Rand
Name: WukWaymark
Description: WukWaymark is a plugin for Final Fantasy XIV that allows players to create and manage custom map markers around Eorzea. Whether its that one spot you use often for GPosing, a venue you frequented once but decided to go again or simply anything that you find interesting, WukWaymark will allow you to create a custom waymark for it and make it appear on both the main map and the minimap itself! Think of it as `<flag>` but permanent.
